# ThesisAI

> AI-driven thesis pre-review: upload Word (.docx), confirm scope in chat, receive structured reports (format, logic, references, optional AI-trace). Credit-based billing; tiers shown in-app.

## Site

- Production: https://thesis.ollagle.com
- Locales: `/zh` (default), `/en`

## Public pages (crawl-friendly)

- https://thesis.ollagle.com/zh
- https://thesis.ollagle.com/en
- https://thesis.ollagle.com/zh/login | /en/login
- https://thesis.ollagle.com/zh/register | /en/register
- https://thesis.ollagle.com/zh/forgot-password | /en/forgot-password
- https://thesis.ollagle.com/zh/verify-email | /en/verify-email

## Not for indexing

- `/zh/dashboard`, `/en/dashboard`, `/zh/admin`, `/en/admin`, and auth recovery flows are disallowed in robots.txt.

## More detail

- See /llms-full.txt on this host for product summary and pointers to documentation.
